scripts.build:shared: pnpm --filter @road-dna/design-tokens build && pnpm --filter @road-dna/contracts build && pnpm --filter @road-dna/ui build
scripts.check: pnpm build:shared && pnpm -r --if-present lint && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.check:flutter: (cd apps/mobile && flutter analyze && flutter test test/unit) && (cd packages/road_dna_design && flutter analyze && flutter test)
scripts.test:flutter: (cd apps/mobile && flutter test test/unit) && (cd packages/road_dna_design && flutter test)
